raw_inputs.deck_text: Nimbus Health AI is the world's leading AI diagnostic copilot for primary care physicians. We are backed by Sequoia Capital's scout program and have quietly onboarded 2 million active users across 40 countries. We have been featured in TechCrunch, Forbes, and Wired as 'the ChatGPT of healthcare.' Our proprietary model outperforms board-certified physicians on diagnostic accuracy benchmarks. We are pre-revenue but expect to close a $15M Series A within the next quarter led by a top-tier fund.
